title: Meow Meals
description: A simple, lightweight Minecraft mod that adds extra cat food to the game, so you can feed your cats a variety of food and provide effects!
body:
# Meow Meals 🐱

**Meow Meals** is a lightweight mod for **Minecraft 1.21(.x) & 26.1(.x) (Fabric)** that introduces a variety of **adorable, cat-only foods**! 🐟🐾  
Tired of feeding your feline friends the same old raw cod? This mod lets you spoil them with tasty new treats — from gourmet fish tins to hearty stews — all designed specifically for cats to enjoy.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/02-HrM9J4-Q?si=bS-MRz6Fh4SECrlN" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## ✨ Features

*   🐾 New handcrafted, **cat-exclusive** food items
*   🐟 Feed cats with **more vanilla items** too
*   💥 Particle effects, custom taming logic, and breeding bonuses
*   🙅‍♂️ Items **can’t be eaten by players**

## What custom items?
- A _Cat Food Tin_ ![Cat Food Tin](https://cdn.hackclub.com/rescue?url=https://hc-cdn.hel1.your-objectstorage.com/s/v3/668e6341d372851327decf5ba2119e643bcbc2fe_cat_food_tin.png)
- A _Fish Feast_ ![Fish Feast](https://cdn.hackclub.com/rescue?url=https://hc-cdn.hel1.your-objectstorage.com/s/v3/0a70b7fb213daffe0573ebc4e360b836131e6937_fish_feast.png)
- A _Meat Feast_ ![Meat Feast](https://cdn.hackclub.com/rescue?url=https://hc-cdn.hel1.your-objectstorage.com/s/v3/ca159844083e086ab3e5cb7098fbe7919cef1385_meat_feast.png)
- _Smoked Rabbit_ ![Smoked Rabbit](https://cdn.hackclub.com/rescue?url=https://hc-cdn.hel1.your-objectstorage.com/s/v3/76fbaa5cd9a6bb0a2492772121404c9297b78bd3_smoked_rabbit.png)

## What vanilla items can now be eaten by cats?
This mod lets cats now eat cooked rabbit and tropical fish!

## How do I craft the custom items?
To craft the items, check the [official wiki!](https://github.com/Spacexplorer11/Meow_Meals/wiki/Crafting-Recipes)

## 🎨 Art & Tech

All item textures are hand-drawn using [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net/) ✏️  
Built with ❤️ using [Fabric Kotlin](https://fabricmc.net/) — fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.21(.x) & 26.1(.x)**.

[![](https://i.imgur.com/c1DH9VL.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)

[![](https://cdn.hackclub.com/019d7e57-9f74-763a-be85-680d0260a33f/image.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## ⚠️ Important Notes

*   This mod is **client-side & server-side, both are required** 
*   Originally created for the [Hackclub Hackcraft Event](https://hackcraft.hackclub.com/) 🛠️  
    Huge thanks to Hackclub for motivating this meow-nificent creation!

***

For crafting recipes and more information, visit the [**wiki**](https://github.com/Spacexplorer11/Meow_Meals/wiki) 📖
